summary: Completed testing of WILDWAVE landing page updates - New logo, video controls with sound, and simplified Impressum. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: Header logo displays new uploaded image correctly (https://customer-assets.emergentagent.com/job_site-refresh-126/artifacts/wsghz2sf_WebCraft_Solutions_-_1_20260323_005319_0000.png)
Footer logo displays same image with inverted/white styling (brightness-0 invert classes applied)
Video has controls attribute - users can play/pause and adjust volume
Video is NOT muted (video.muted = false) - can play with sound
Video retains autoplay, loop, and playsInline attributes
Impressum modal does NOT contain UID or Handelsregistereintrag
Impressum modal does NOT contain Mehrwertsteuer or MWST
Impressum contains required section: Angaben gemäss Art. 3 DSG (company info)
Impressum contains required section: Vertretungsberechtigte Person
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested changes verified: 1) New logo image displays in header and footer (with inverted styling in footer), 2) Video has controls and is not muted, 3) Impressum simplified - UID and Mehrwertsteuer sections removed while keeping required legal sections.
